Banshee miniature shrieking over windswept-moor terrain, fleeing peasant figures covering ears with terror-painted faces and heather-flock base under stormy gray-blue dramatic LED.
Orc warboss miniature wrestling cave-bear on rocky-arena terrain, tribal-spectator figures chanting around fire-pits with drybrushed fur and ash-scatter under flickering orange cabinet spotlight.
Warlock miniature binding flame-elemental inside arcane-circle terrain, glowing-chain spell-effects painted translucent, scorched-flagstone base and grimoire-props under crimson-red key-light.

Bugbear ambush diorama with fur-cloaked miniatures leaping from boulder-outcrops onto dwarf caravan below, overturned barrel scatter and dirt-road terrain with drybrushed chainmail under forest-shadow spotlight.

Dragon hatchling miniature gnawing knight's shield on nest-platform terrain, broken-egg props scattered, adventurer figures climbing tower-ladder below with metallic-scale highlights under warm cabinet LED.

Gnoll packmaster miniature cracking whip over hyena-kennel terrain, snarling beast-figures straining chains, bone-trophy necklace freehand and dirt-floor base with straw-scatter under torchlight key-light.

Elf wardancer miniatures whirling through moonlit-glade terrain with ribbon-blades extended mid-spin, orc figures recoiling backward, blossom-flock base and translucent-silk painting under blue spotlight.
Dwarven ram-crew miniatures heaving siege-engine forward on mountain-trail terrain, goblin boulder-rollers above on cliff-edge, iron-banding metallics and pine-needle flock under dusty LED glow.

Revenant knight miniature rising from battlefield-grave terrain, tattered-banner clutched in gauntlet, fleeing necromancer figure ahead with rusted-armor drybrushing and fog-cotton effects under cold moonlight cabinet spotlight.

Kobold trap-corridor diorama with swinging-blade miniatures triggering mid-slice, diving rogue figure beneath with treasure-sack, stone-brick wash-shading and moss-detail under flickering orange key-light.

Frost-drake miniature exhaling ice-breath spell-effect across tundra terrain toward shield-wall barbarian figures, crystalline-scale layering and snow-drift flock base under cold blue-white dramatic LED.

Goblin war-drums diorama with musician miniatures pounding hide-drums around bonfire terrain, dancing shaman-figure with staff raised, tribal-paint freehand and ash-scatter base under orange cabinet spotlight.

Armored wight miniatures marching through fog-shrouded ruins terrain with rusted-halberds lowered, terrified pilgrim figures fleeing past crumbled-archway with drybrushed stone and spectral-mist cotton under eerie green key-light.

Halfling burglar miniature suspended mid-rope-swing over sleeping-dragon's gold-hoard terrain, gemstone-scatter base with painted coin-piles, torch-bearing dwarf-accomplice below under warm golden cabinet spotlight.

Drow raiding-party miniatures bursting from web-shrouded cave-mouth terrain with crossbows raised, surface-elf defenders forming bow-line, drybrushed obsidian-rocks and spider-egg flock under violet LED glow.

Troll miniature tearing wizard-tower door from hinges mid-roar, apprentice figures fleeing through window-props with spell-books, moss-covered stonework and ivy-flock base under moonlit blue cabinet spotlight.

Knight-errant miniature kneeling at roadside-shrine terrain presenting sword-hilt, blessing-cleric figure overhead with painted stained-glass backdrop and wildflower-flock base under warm celestial key-light.
Goblin lobber-crew miniatures launching flaming-boulder from catapult terrain toward distant keep-walls, smoke-cotton trajectory-arc and scorched-grass flock base under orange-red dramatic LED glow.
Medusa miniature coiled atop temple-ruins terrain with serpent-hair writhing, shield-reflecting warrior figure mid-advance and petrified-statue props scattered under green-gray cabinet spotlight.
Barbarian warband miniatures fording river-crossing terrain with axes raised, defending militia-figures on opposite bank with resin-water effects and reed-flock under cold blue-white key-light.

Githyanki dragon-rider miniature swooping low over astral-reef terrain, silver-sword extended toward mind-flayer skiff below, cosmic-painted backdrop and crystal-outcrop flock under purple dramatic LED.

Dwarf thane miniature rallying shieldbearer-figures at crumbling-gatehouse terrain, orc horde pressing forward with siege-ladder, freehand-banner heraldry and rubble-scatter base under torch-orange cabinet spotlight.

Treant ancient miniature striding through lumber-village terrain with branch-arms sweeping, panicked villager-figures fleeing burning-cottages, bark-texture layering and pine-flock under ember-glow key-light.

Orc boar-chariot miniature careening across muddy-battlefield terrain, spiked wheels crushing fallen shields, dwarf defender figures bracing spear-wall with drybrushed chainmail and dirt-splatter flock under dusty LED.

Lich miniature hovering above summoning-pentagram terrain with staff channeling purple lightning-bolt spell-effect, wight bodyguard figures raising rusted swords, crumbling-crypt diorama under cold moonlight cabinet spotlight.

Elven scout miniatures stalking through autumn-forest terrain with drawn longbows mid-aim, bugbear raider figures unaware beside campfire-prop, moss-covered log and leaf-scatter flock under golden key-light.

Dwarf hold throne-room diorama with king miniature on stone-seat judging captive-troll figure in chains, axe-guard figures flanking with freehand-heraldry shields and flagstone base under warm amber LED.
